keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Lee Kang-In (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Mexico 0, Korea Republic 0.
Goal! Mexico 1, Korea Republic 0. Luis Romo (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Hwang Hee-Chan replaces Lee Jae-Sung.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Oh Hyeon-Gyu replaces Son Heung-Min.
Paik Seung-Ho (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Mexico. Orbelín Pineda replaces Brian Gutiérrez.
Substitution, Mexico. Obed Vargas replaces Luis Romo.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Eom Ji-Sung replaces Kim Moon-Hwan.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Yang Hyun-Jun replaces Seol Young-Woo.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Cho Gue-Sung replaces Paik Seung-Ho.
Substitution, Mexico. Israel Reyes replaces Roberto Alvarado.
Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Raúl Jiménez.
Substitution, Mexico. César Huerta replaces Julián Quiñones.
Delay in match because of an injury Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half ends, Mexico 1, Korea Republic 0.
